## 📝 Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to...
2. Click on...
3. See error...

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## 🧩 Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- Laravel version: [e.g. 10.x]
- PHP version: [e.g. 8.1]
